\tzpentry{ID3781}{Phase Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3781 introduces Phase Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \dot{\phi}_i = \Omega_i + \sum_{\substack{j=1\\ j\neq i}}^{N} K_{ij}\,\sin\!\big(\phi_j-\phi_i\big), \qquad i=1,\dots,N. \label{eq:kuramoto_orbits} \end{equation}
